objectives.name: Craft a Stone Pickaxe via Overgeared

title: Overgeared: Stone Tools
description:
With a flint axe you can now gather wood and build a shelter. But to really progress, you need proper tools.

Mine some §lstone§r — Overgeared changes what drops: instead of cobblestone, you'll get §lknappable rock§r.

To use it, §lshift+right-click§r on a stone block to place the §lStone Smithing Anvil§r.
Then craft clay molds, smelt them in a furnace to get tool casts, and forge your first §lstone pickaxe§r.

With a stone pickaxe you can mine copper, but NOT iron — for that you'll need copper tools first.
